creator: seggers@semyam.dinoco.de
text:
The LyX port requires ispell as a run dependency but the only
place it seems to get used is the spell checking option.  If one does
not use it (like me because I have no German dictionary for ispell) it
is useless.

Fix: 

Remove this run dependency and replace it with a warning put
out during package install that for using the spell checking one has
to have ispell installed.
How-To-Repeat: 
	Just try to install LyX on a system w/o ispell.
